lifeStages.name: Trying to Conceive
lifeStages.description: Preparing your body for pregnancy with foundational nutritional support.
lifeStages.longDescription: The preconception period is a crucial time for establishing optimal nutritional status. Supporting your body with key nutrients before conception can help create the best possible foundation for pregnancy.
focus: Folate and B-vitamins for cellular health
lifestyle: Maintain a balanced diet rich in whole foods
Stay physically active with moderate exercise

lifeStages.name: Pregnancy
lifeStages.description: Nourishing mother and baby with safe, research-backed support.
lifeStages.longDescription: Pregnancy is a time of extraordinary nutritional demands. Every ingredient we recommend for this stage has been carefully evaluated for both safety and efficacy during pregnancy.
lifestyle: Eat frequent, small meals to manage nausea
Continue gentle exercise as approved by your provider
lifeStages.safetyNote: Always consult your healthcare provider before starting any supplement during pregnancy.

lifeStages.name: Postpartum
lifeStages.description: Recovery, replenishment, and support for the fourth trimester.
lifeStages.longDescription: The postpartum period requires intensive nutritional support for recovery, healing, and (if breastfeeding) milk production. This stage focuses on replenishment and resilience.
lifestyle: Stay connected with your support network
Be gentle with yourself during recovery

lifeStages.name: General Wellness
lifeStages.description: Daily support for vitality, balance, and long-term health.
lifeStages.longDescription: Whether you're between life stages or simply focused on maintaining optimal health, our wellness formulas provide foundational support for energy, stress resilience, and overall vitality.
lifestyle: Maintain consistent sleep and wake times

quizQuestions.question: Which best describes your current life stage?
What is your primary wellness goal?
Do you experience occasional nausea or digestive discomfort?
How would you describe your stress levels?

options.text: High - I feel stressed most days
